markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review Q4 performance and align on the 2026 organic content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/ejEQ626Zubq5AVv_woMsVnMwjSx9gD9w?tab=summary&timestamp=434.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Performance:** GrowthX content drives 30% of site clicks and 80% of impressions, with a 250-keyword gain and 50% Domain Authority growth.](https://fathom.video/share/ejEQ626Zubq5AVv_woMsVnMwjSx9gD9w?tab=summary&timestamp=868.0)
  - [**Strategy Shift:** Evolving from a "closed-loop AI" focus to a broader "workforce enablement" narrative, supported by a content refresh and new AI summaries.](https://fathom.video/share/ejEQ626Zubq5AVv_woMsVnMwjSx9gD9w?tab=summary&timestamp=1326.0)
  - [**New Tool:** GrowthX's "CheckThat" tool will track Imubit's LLM citations against competitors, enabling a data-driven strategy to win evaluation-stage prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/ejEQ626Zubq5AVv_woMsVnMwjSx9gD9w?tab=summary&timestamp=1441.0)
  - [**Renewal:** A flat renewal is proposed for the April 28 contract end, maintaining the 7-piece/week cadence and adding bi-weekly executive reporting.](https://fathom.video/share/ejEQ626Zubq5AVv_woMsVnMwjSx9gD9w?tab=summary&timestamp=2619.0)

## Topics

### Initial Mandate & Performance

  - [**Initial Mandate (April 2025):**](https://fathom.video/share/ejEQ626Zubq5AVv_woMsVnMwjSx9gD9w?tab=summary&timestamp=523.0)
      - [**Category Definition:** Articulate "closed-loop AI optimization" to own the narrative.](https://fathom.video/share/ejEQ626Zubq5AVv_woMsVnMwjSx9gD9w?tab=summary&timestamp=554.0)
      - [**Market Reach:** Shift early-stage education from sales to a strong organic content library.](https://fathom.video/share/ejEQ626Zubq5AVv_woMsVnMwjSx9gD9w?tab=summary&timestamp=615.0)
      - [**Capacity:** Build a scalable content engine to avoid review bottlenecks.](https://fathom.video/share/ejEQ626Zubq5AVv_woMsVnMwjSx9gD9w?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)
  - [**Editorial Content Production:**](https://fathom.video/share/ejEQ626Zubq5AVv_woMsVnMwjSx9gD9w?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)
      - [**Process:** GrowthX's Atlas platform uses AI for drafting, with human editors ensuring quality.](https://fathom.video/share/ejEQ626Zubq5AVv_woMsVnMwjSx9gD9w?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)
      - [**Output:** 224 pieces published (7/week), with refresh work now underway.](https://fathom.video/share/ejEQ626Zubq5AVv_woMsVnMwjSx9gD9w?tab=summary&timestamp=825.0)
      - [**Traffic:** GrowthX articles drive 30% of site clicks and 80% of impressions.](https://fathom.video/share/ejEQ626Zubq5AVv_woMsVnMwjSx9gD9w?tab=summary&timestamp=868.0)
      - [**Keywords:** 250 new organic keyword positions gained; 28 are in Google's AI Overview.](https://fathom.video/share/ejEQ626Zubq5AVv_woMsVnMwjSx9gD9w?tab=summary&timestamp=949.0)
  - [**Backlinking:**](https://fathom.video/share/ejEQ626Zubq5AVv_woMsVnMwjSx9gD9w?tab=summary&timestamp=1106.0)
      - [**Growth:** Referring domains doubled; Domain Authority (DA) grew 50%.](https://fathom.video/share/ejEQ626Zubq5AVv_woMsVnMwjSx9gD9w?tab=summary&timestamp=1127.0)
      - [**Significance:** Higher DA provides a stronger baseline for all content to rank and appear in LLM citations.](https://fathom.video/share/ejEQ626Zubq5AVv_woMsVnMwjSx9gD9w?tab=summary&timestamp=1188.0)
      - [**Action:** Matt to share the backlink list for relevance review.](https://fathom.video/share/ejEQ626Zubq5AVv_woMsVnMwjSx9gD9w?tab=summary&timestamp=1268.0)

### Evolving Strategy & New Tools

  - [**Positioning Shift:**](https://fathom.video/share/ejEQ626Zubq5AVv_woMsVnMwjSx9gD9w?tab=summary&timestamp=1326.0)
      - [**From:** "Closed-loop AI" as the solution.](https://fathom.video/share/ejEQ626Zubq5AVv_woMsVnMwjSx9gD9w?tab=summary&timestamp=1326.0)
      - [**To:** A broader "workforce enablement" narrative, with closed-loop AI as a "North Star."](https://fathom.video/share/ejEQ626Zubq5AVv_woMsVnMwjSx9gD9w?tab=summary&timestamp=1326.0)
      - [**Action:** A content audit will refresh existing articles with the new messaging.](https://fathom.video/share/ejEQ626Zubq5AVv_woMsVnMwjSx9gD9w?tab=summary&timestamp=1378.0)
  - [**LLM Visibility & "CheckThat":**](https://fathom.video/share/ejEQ626Zubq5AVv_woMsVnMwjSx9gD9w?tab=summary&timestamp=1441.0)
      - [**Goal:** Optimize content for AI-powered discovery, especially for evaluation-stage prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/ejEQ626Zubq5AVv_woMsVnMwjSx9gD9w?tab=summary&timestamp=1441.0)
      - [**Tool:** GrowthX's "CheckThat" tracks LLM citations (e.g., Perplexity, ChatGPT) against competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/ejEQ626Zubq5AVv_woMsVnMwjSx9gD9w?tab=summary&timestamp=1493.0)
      - [**Functionality:** Identifies citation sources → enables data-driven content creation to win specific prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/ejEQ626Zubq5AVv_woMsVnMwjSx9gD9w?tab=summary&timestamp=2010.0)
      - [**Action:** Tara and Matt to align on key prompts to track.](https://fathom.video/share/ejEQ626Zubq5AVv_woMsVnMwjSx9gD9w?tab=summary&timestamp=2055.0)
  - [**Agency Collaboration:**](https://fathom.video/share/ejEQ626Zubq5AVv_woMsVnMwjSx9gD9w?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)
      - [**New Agency:** Imubit is onboarding New Breed for paid demand gen.](https://fathom.video/share/ejEQ626Zubq5AVv_woMsVnMwjSx9gD9w?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Paid will augment organic, not replace it. Organic content will inform paid campaigns.](https://fathom.video/share/ejEQ626Zubq5AVv_woMsVnMwjSx9gD9w?tab=summary&timestamp=1629.0)
      - [**Action:** A joint strategy call is planned after New Breed's onboarding.](https://fathom.video/share/ejEQ626Zubq5AVv_woMsVnMwjSx9gD9w?tab=summary&timestamp=2301.0)

### Renewal Proposal & Reporting

  - [**Renewal Terms:** Flat renewal for the April 28 contract end.](https://fathom.video/share/ejEQ626Zubq5AVv_woMsVnMwjSx9gD9w?tab=summary&timestamp=2619.0)
      - [**Content:** 7 pieces/week (net new + refreshes).](https://fathom.video/share/ejEQ626Zubq5AVv_woMsVnMwjSx9gD9w?tab=summary&timestamp=2619.0)
      - [**Support:** Continued backlinking, technical SEO, and quarterly content audits.](https://fathom.video/share/ejEQ626Zubq5AVv_woMsVnMwjSx9gD9w?tab=summary&timestamp=2619.0)
  - [**New Reporting Cadence:**](https://fathom.video/share/ejEQ626Zubq5AVv_woMsVnMwjSx9gD9w?tab=summary&timestamp=2731.0)
      - [**Executive Updates:** Bi-weekly snapshots for Tim to share internally.](https://fathom.video/share/ejEQ626Zubq5AVv_woMsVnMwjSx9gD9w?tab=summary&timestamp=2731.0)
      - [**Timing:** Delivered the Friday before Imubit's bi-weekly pipeline meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/ejEQ626Zubq5AVv_woMsVnMwjSx9gD9w?tab=summary&timestamp=2763.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Proactively answer executive questions and demonstrate ROI.](https://fathom.video/share/ejEQ626Zubq5AVv_woMsVnMwjSx9gD9w?tab=summary&timestamp=2731.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Matt:**](https://fathom.video/share/ejEQ626Zubq5AVv_woMsVnMwjSx9gD9w?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)
      - [Share keyword research and the QBR deck with Tara.](https://fathom.video/share/ejEQ626Zubq5AVv_woMsVnMwjSx9gD9w?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)
      - [Share the backlink list for review.](https://fathom.video/share/ejEQ626Zubq5AVv_woMsVnMwjSx9gD9w?tab=summary&timestamp=1268.0)
      - [Send "CheckThat" invites to Tara and Tim.](https://fathom.video/share/ejEQ626Zubq5AVv_woMsVnMwjSx9gD9w?tab=summary&timestamp=2196.0)
      - [Begin delivering bi-weekly executive updates.](https://fathom.video/share/ejEQ626Zubq5AVv_woMsVnMwjSx9gD9w?tab=summary&timestamp=2731.0)
  - [**Tara:**](https://fathom.video/share/ejEQ626Zubq5AVv_woMsVnMwjSx9gD9w?tab=summary&timestamp=2479.0)
      - [Get process info from Imubit's dev team on creating AI summaries.](https://fathom.video/share/ejEQ626Zubq5AVv_woMsVnMwjSx9gD9w?tab=summary&timestamp=2479.0)
      - [Schedule a joint strategy call with New Breed.](https://fathom.video/share/ejEQ626Zubq5AVv_woMsVnMwjSx9gD9w?tab=summary&timestamp=2301.0)
  - [**Tara & Matt:**](https://fathom.video/share/ejEQ626Zubq5AVv_woMsVnMwjSx9gD9w?tab=summary&timestamp=2055.0)
      - [Align on key prompts to track in "CheckThat" during the weekly sync.](https://fathom.video/share/ejEQ626Zubq5AVv_woMsVnMwjSx9gD9w?tab=summary&timestamp=2055.0)
